careers.title: AI Engineer
careers.description: Builds AI systems that process data, make predictions, and power intelligent applications.
careers.marketquest_teaches: Agent Debate, Ensemble Agent, AI Tool Scout, Reality Engine
careers.beginner_project: Build a simple news sentiment scorer for one ticker

careers.title: Data Scientist
careers.description: Analyzes data to find patterns, build models, and communicate insights.
careers.marketquest_teaches: Reality Scores, Learning Lab, benchmark comparisons, event radar
careers.beginner_project: Compare agent hit rates vs random baseline over 2 weeks of snapshots

careers.title: Quant Researcher
careers.description: Develops systematic trading strategies using math, data, and backtesting.
careers.marketquest_teaches: Benchmark players, momentum baseline, multi-horizon outcomes
careers.beginner_project: Implement a transparent momentum rule and compare to SPY

careers.title: Business Analyst
careers.description: Connects business problems to data and helps teams make better decisions.
careers.marketquest_teaches: Event Radar, entity graph, lesson cards, filing events
careers.beginner_project: Write a one-page brief on how an 8-K filing affects a sector

careers.title: Portfolio Analyst
careers.description: Tracks holdings, performance, and risk for investment portfolios.
careers.beginner_project: Track a paper portfolio vs SPY for one month

careers.title: Economist
careers.description: Studies how economies work — growth, inflation, employment, and policy.
careers.marketquest_teaches: Macro Agent, FRED data, cross-asset strip, currency connections
careers.beginner_project: Explain how a Fed rate change might affect three different sectors

careers.title: Risk Manager
careers.description: Identifies and measures risks in portfolios and trading operations.
careers.marketquest_teaches: Skeptic Agent, stale-data flags, drawdown scoring, honesty disclosures
careers.beginner_project: List 5 reasons a hyped headline trade could fail

careers.title: Financial Software Developer
careers.description: Builds trading platforms, data pipelines, and financial applications.
careers.marketquest_teaches: Reality Engine, data providers, API routes, freshness layer
careers.beginner_project: Build a watchlist dashboard that shows data freshness badges

careers.title: Product Manager
careers.description: Defines what to build, prioritizes features, and connects users to value.
careers.marketquest_teaches: Full game loop — events to picks to scoring to learning
careers.beginner_project: Design a new mini-challenge and write acceptance criteria

careers.title: Entrepreneur
careers.description: Starts businesses by identifying problems and building solutions people need.
careers.marketquest_teaches: AI Tool Scout, research registries, building with free tools
careers.beginner_project: Research 3 free market data APIs and pitch a student-friendly app idea

careers.title: Public Policy Analyst
careers.description: Studies how government decisions affect economies, industries, and people.
careers.marketquest_teaches: Government feeds, macro events, public figure agent, entity graph
careers.beginner_project: Trace how a policy headline connects to sector tickers via entity graph

careers.title: Market Research Analyst
careers.description: Studies markets, competitors, and consumer trends to guide business strategy.
careers.marketquest_teaches: News radar, sentiment, sector mapping, lesson cards
careers.beginner_project: Map 5 headlines to affected sectors with reasoning
